hypothesis: Rolling QCI predicts future volatility beyond realized-variance baseline.

null_model.description: Circular block-bootstrap of the return series.
null_model.independence_argument: Block bootstrap preserves local autocorrelation but destroys long-range coupling; no structure shared with positive-arm clustering.

decision_rules.accept_criterion: Partial-r(QCI, future_vol | RV) negative with p<0.01 in >=80% of seeds.

observer_projection.description: K-means cluster labels of 6D standardized return features; labels mapped through calibrated cmap to (b,e) in {1..24}.
